page_subtitle: Organise your extractions by project. Upload files into a project to pull structured data out of them.
create_subtitle: Give your project a name and a short description.
field_description_placeholder: What kind of documents will live in this project?

delete_description: "{{name}}" and its data will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
